mapper.insert: INSERT INTO club_manages ( HOST_ID, CLUB_TITLE, LOCATION, MAX_MEMBERS, DESCRIPTION, STATUS, REG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{hostId}, #{clubTitle}, #{location}, #{maxMembers}, #{description}, '운영중', NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT CLUB_ID AS clubId, HOST_ID AS hostId, CLUB_TITLE AS clubTitle, LOCATION AS location, MAX_MEMBERS AS maxMembers, LEVEL_LIMIT AS levelLimit, DESCRIPTION AS description, REG_DATE AS regDate, STATUS AS status FROM club_manages WHERE CLUB_ID = #{clubId}

SELECT CLUB_ID AS clubId, HOST_ID AS hostId, CLUB_TITLE AS clubTitle, LOCATION AS location, MAX_MEMBERS AS maxMembers, LEVEL_LIMIT AS levelLimit, DESCRIPTION AS description, REG_DATE AS regDate, STATUS AS status FROM club_manages WHERE HOST_ID = #{hostId} ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC

SELECT MEMBER_SEQ AS memberSeq, CLUB_ID AS clubId, USER_ID AS userId, USER_NAME AS userName, USER_ROLE AS userRole, CREATE_DATE AS createDate, STATUS AS status, ADDR1LEVEL AS addr1Level, ADDR2LEVEL AS addr2Level, ADDR3LEVEL AS addr3Level, GENDER AS gender, BIRTH_YEAR AS birthYear FROM club_members WHERE CLUB_ID = #{clubId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT MEMBER_SEQ AS memberSeq, CLUB_ID AS clubId, USER_ID AS userId, USER_NAME AS userName, USER_ROLE AS userRole, CREATE_DATE AS createDate, STATUS AS status, ADDR1LEVEL AS addr1Level, ADDR2LEVEL AS addr2Level, ADDR3LEVEL AS addr3Level, GENDER AS gender, BIRTH_YEAR AS birthYear FROM club_members WHERE CLUB_ID = #{clubId} AND STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY MEMBER_SEQ ASC

SELECT MEMBER_SEQ AS memberSeq, CLUB_ID AS clubId, USER_ID AS userId, USER_NAME AS userName, USER_ROLE AS userRole, CREATE_DATE AS createDate, STATUS AS status, ADDR1LEVEL AS addr1Level, ADDR2LEVEL AS addr2Level, ADDR3LEVEL AS addr3Level, GENDER AS gender, BIRTH_YEAR AS birthYear FROM club_members WHERE MEMBER_SEQ = #{memberSeq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO club_members ( CLUB_ID, USER_ID, USER_NAME, USER_ROLE, STATUS, ADDR1LEVEL, ADDR2LEVEL, ADDR3LEVEL, GENDER, BIRTH_YEAR, CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{clubId}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{userRole}, #{status}, #{addr1Level}, #{addr2Level}, #{addr3Level}, #{gender}, #{birthYear}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT CodeView AS Addr1Level FROM tb_code WHERE GroupCode = 'NAT' AND UseYN = 'Y' ORDER BY Array ASC
SELECT CodeView AS Addr2Level FROM tb_code WHERE GroupCode = 'PRV' AND UseYN = 'Y' ORDER BY Array ASC
SELECT CodeView AS Addr3Level FROM tb_code WHERE GroupCode = 'DST' AND UseYN = 'Y' ORDER BY Array ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO club_match_courts (MATCH_ID, COURT_NO, WINNER_SIDE) VALUES (#{matchId}, #{courtNo}, #{winnerSide})
INSERT INTO club_match_team_members (COURT_ID, TEAM_SIDE, MEMBER_SEQ) VALUES (#{courtId}, #{teamSide}, #{memberSeq})
mapper.select: SELECT MATCH_ID AS matchId, CLUB_ID AS clubId, MATCH_TYPE AS matchType, CRITERIA AS criteria, COURT_COUNT AS courtCount, MEMBER_COUNT AS memberCount, DATE_FORMAT(MATCH_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS matchDate FROM club_matches WHERE CLUB_ID = #{clubId} ORDER BY MATCH_DATE DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT MATCH_ID AS matchId, CLUB_ID AS clubId, MATCH_TYPE AS matchType, CRITERIA AS criteria, COURT_COUNT AS courtCount, MEMBER_COUNT AS memberCount, DATE_FORMAT(MATCH_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS matchDate FROM club_matches WHERE MATCH_ID = #{matchId}

SELECT c.COURT_ID AS courtId, c.COURT_NO AS courtNo, tm.TEAM_SIDE AS teamSide, m.MEMBER_SEQ AS memberSeq, m.USER_NAME AS userName, m.GENDER AS gender, m.BIRTH_YEAR AS birthYear, m.ADDR1LEVEL AS addr1Level, m.ADDR2LEVEL AS addr2Level, m.ADDR3LEVEL AS addr3Level FROM club_match_courts c JOIN club_match_team_members tm ON tm.COURT_ID = c.COURT_ID JOIN club_members m ON m.MEMBER_SEQ = tm.MEMBER_SEQ WHERE c.MATCH_ID = #{matchId} ORDER BY c.COURT_NO ASC, tm.TEAM_SIDE ASC

SELECT m.MEMBER_SEQ AS memberSeq, m.USER_NAME AS userName, m.GENDER AS gender, m.ADDR1LEVEL AS addr1Level, m.ADDR2LEVEL AS addr2Level, m.ADDR3LEVEL AS addr3Level FROM club_match_waiting w JOIN club_members m ON m.MEMBER_SEQ = w.MEMBER_SEQ WHERE w.MATCH_ID = #{matchId}
mapper.delete: DELETE tm FROM club_match_team_members tm JOIN club_match_courts c ON c.COURT_ID = tm.COURT_ID JOIN club_matches m ON m.MATCH_ID = c.MATCH_ID WHERE m.CLUB_ID = #{clubId}
DELETE w FROM club_match_waiting w JOIN club_matches m ON m.MATCH_ID = w.MATCH_ID WHERE m.CLUB_ID = #{clubId}
DELETE c FROM club_match_courts c JOIN club_matches m ON m.MATCH_ID = c.MATCH_ID WHERE m.CLUB_ID = #{clubId}
mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_SEQ AS memberSeq, USER_NAME AS userName, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS createDate, DATEDIFF(NOW(), CREATE_DATE) AS daysSinceJoin FROM club_members WHERE CLUB_ID = #{clubId} AND STATUS = 'Y' AND USER_ROLE != 'GUEST' ORDER BY CREATE_DATE DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT mt.MATCH_ID AS matchId, DATE_FORMAT(mt.MATCH_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS matchDate, mt.MATCH_TYPE AS matchType, c.WINNER_SIDE AS winnerSide, GROUP_CONCAT(CASE WHEN tm.TEAM_SIDE = 'A' THEN m.USER_NAME END SEPARATOR ', ') AS teamAName, GROUP_CONCAT(CASE WHEN tm.TEAM_SIDE = 'B' THEN m.USER_NAME END SEPARATOR ', ') AS teamBName FROM club_matches mt JOIN club_match_courts c ON c.MATCH_ID = mt.MATCH_ID JOIN club_match_team_members tm ON tm.COURT_ID = c.COURT_ID JOIN club_members m ON m.MEMBER_SEQ = tm.MEMBER_SEQ WHERE mt.CLUB_ID = #{clubId} AND c.WINNER_SIDE IS NOT NULL GROUP BY mt.MATCH_ID, mt.MATCH_DATE, mt.MATCH_TYPE, c.WINNER_SIDE ORDER BY mt.MATCH_DATE DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT m.MEMBER_SEQ AS memberSeq, m.USER_NAME AS userName, COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(mt.MATCH_DATE)) AS attendDays, COUNT(*) AS gameCount, SUM(CASE WHEN tm.TEAM_SIDE = c.WINNER_SIDE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS winCount, SUM(CASE WHEN tm.TEAM_SIDE = c.WINNER_SIDE THEN 3 ELSE 1 END) AS totalScore FROM club_match_team_members tm JOIN club_match_courts c ON c.COURT_ID = tm.COURT_ID JOIN club_matches mt ON mt.MATCH_ID = c.MATCH_ID JOIN club_members m ON m.MEMBER_SEQ = tm.MEMBER_SEQ WHERE mt.CLUB_ID = #{clubId} AND c.WINNER_SIDE IS NOT NULL AND m.USER_ROLE != 'GUEST' AND YEAR(mt.MATCH_DATE) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(mt.MATCH_DATE) = MONTH(CURDATE()) GROUP BY m.MEMBER_SEQ, m.USER_NAME ORDER BY totalScore DESC, winCount DESC, attendDays DESC LIMIT 5
